name: Mucous Membrane Milkshake
recipeInstructions: Measure all of the ingredients, except the milk, into a blender. Blend on medium speed until smooth and creamy. Add more ice cream if desired for extra thickness. Pour mixture into tall glasses and refrigerate. Heat the milk in a small pan over medium heat until it begins to boil. Remove from heat and let cool slightly until a film forms on top. Carefully scoop off the film using a wooden spoon and place some on each milkshake. If more mucus is needed, reheat remaining milk and repeat. Blend pieces of pineapple for phlegm balls or red cherries for blood clots.
